# outstandingFileTransfers

**Instance Property**

An array of in-progress file transfers.

## Declaration

```swift
var outstandingFileTransfers: [WCSessionFileTransfer] { get }
```

## Discussion

This property contains the [doc://com.apple.watchconnectivity/documentation/WatchConnectivity/WCSessionFileTransfer] objects representing the files that are queued for delivery but have not yet been delivered to the counterpart. You can use the objects to cancel specific file transfers.

## Transferring Files in the Background

- **transferFile(_:metadata:)**: Sends the specified file and optional dictionary to the counterpart.
- **hasContentPending**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the session has more content to deliver.
